name: Repo Bootstrap
description: Composite skill — configure a fresh or under-configured repo for the release-branch workflow in one pass. Creates the `release` branch on origin, seeds Keep-a-Changelog `CHANGELOG.md`, drops in `.claude/dep-sweep-config.json` + `.claude/branch-hygiene-config.json` + a `release-cadence.md` standard stub, opens a `chore/repo-bootstrap` PR to main. Without this, none of the release-branch composites can fire. Idempotent.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Bootstrap de Repo
pt-BR.description: Skill composto — configura em uma passada um repo novo ou subconfigurado para o fluxo de release-branch. Cria a branch `release` no origin, semeia `CHANGELOG.md` em Keep-a-Changelog, instala `.claude/dep-sweep-config.json` + `.claude/branch-hygiene-config.json` + um stub do standard `release-cadence.md`, abre um PR `chore/repo-bootstrap` para main. Sem isso, nenhum dos compostos de release-branch consegue disparar. Idempotente.
